economic_notes: Nation has diverse business interests including retail/services, natural resource, and industrial businesses. GBEs generated total revenue of $36.5M and net income of $2.47M in 2020. Sale of two lots of land agreed for $515,000 closing August 2020. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event with potential material impact on 2021 surplus. New RBC loan of $1,908,387 obtained post year-end for Comox Valley Shakes (2019) Ltd.
notes: Fiscal year 2020. Three entities consolidated line-by-line (Quinsam Properties BT Inc., Quinsam Reserve Leasing Inc., 1223053 BC Ltd.). Sixteen GBEs accounted for under modified equity method. Prior year (2019) surplus of $14.3M was unusually high, largely due to $8.24M income from GBEs vs $1.6M in 2020 — likely a one-time event in 2019. Due from GBEs of $12.25M is a significant intercompany balance. Nation contingently liable for $5.72M in CMHC loan guarantees to band members. Wages and benefits in Schedule of Expenses by Object ($1,689,746) differs slightly from segment disclosure wages ($1,645,996) due to allocation methodology. ISC in segment disclosure ($4,838,195) differs slightly from statement of operations ($4,854,592) due to inter-program netting. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC + Province of BC + FNHA + CMHC + NVIATS + KDC + FNESC = 4854592+1100122+138630+86739+92759+81960+93768 = 6448570.
